title: You have an app idea. But where to start?
description: Having an idea is great. Knowing how to turn it into an app published on the stores is another thing.

cards.title: Development is complex
cards.description: iOS, Android, macOS — each platform has its own rules, tools, and constraints. Hard to navigate.
features: Design and UX to think through

cards.title: Agencies are expensive
cards.description: Agencies charge tens of thousands. For a freelancer or small business, it's often out of budget.
features: Loss of control over the project

cards.title: No-code has its limits
cards.description: No-code tools allow prototyping, but for a performant native app published on stores, you need real code.
